trackSelector.title: Learn SPIFFE
trackSelector.subtitle: Choose your learning path based on how much time you have. Each track builds on the previous one.
trackSelector.hint: You can switch tracks anytime. Progress is saved automatically.

bronze.title: Bronze
bronze.subtitle: What is SPIFFE?
bronze.description: The identity crisis and SPIFFE concepts. Perfect for a quick introduction.
bronze.goal: Now I can explain SPIFFE to someone

silver.title: Silver
silver.subtitle: How SPIFFE Works
silver.description: SPIRE architecture, attestation flows, and using identity. Understand the system.
silver.goal: Now I understand how the system works

gold.title: Gold
gold.subtitle: SPIFFE Deep Dive
gold.description: Complete course with identity lifecycle, advanced concepts, and federation.
gold.goal: Now I can implement and debug
